metadata.title: MIDIOutput Interface (MDN Reference)
metadata.summary: MDN reference for MIDIOutput: send() with optional timestamp, clear(), and message validity.

description: The MIDIOutput interface of the Web MIDI API provides methods to add messages to the queue of an output device, and to clear the queue of messages.
availability: Limited availability This feature is not Baseline because it does not work in some of the most widely-used browsers.

instance_methods.name: send
instance_methods.description: Queues a message to be sent to the MIDI port.

instance_methods.name: clear
instance_methods.description: Clears any pending send data from the queue.

examples: function sendMiddleC(midiAccess, portID) { const noteOnMessage = [0x90, 60, 0x7f]; // note on, middle C, full velocity const output = midiAccess.outputs.get(portID); output.send(noteOnMessage); // sends the message. }
